name: opportunistic_deployment
description: Monitors a watchlist of equities/indices for drawdowns from all-time highs and triggers tranche-buy alerts at -20%/-30%/-40% bands. Sizes tranches against available cash, attaches expiry rules and technical-analysis markers, and always requires human approval before execution.

watchlist.description: Instruments to evaluate for opportunistic deployment.

available_cash.description: Cash reserve available for deployment in account currency.

tranche_bands.description: Drawdown bands (as positive fractions) and the fraction of cash to deploy at each. Default: [{drawdown:0.20,deploy:0.25},{0.30,0.35},{0.40,0.40}].

drawdown.description: Drawdown from ATH as a positive fraction, e.g. 0.20 for -20%.

deploy_fraction.description: Fraction of available cash to deploy at this band (0..1).

expiry_days.description: Number of days a triggered tranche alert remains valid (default 5).

as_of_date.description: Evaluation date, ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today (UTC).
